headline: Saturday discipline—stop snacking, lock in movement now
summary: You're 0.22 kg/week short of your pace; Saturday weakness means today determines if you catch up or fall further behind.
details: Today: eat only Huel and whole foods—no emotional snacking, no vegan treats, no portion creep. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45–60 minutes to close your deficit gap. 213 days behind on 88 kg: every weekend choice either serves your goal or your excuses. This Saturday is not a break; it's a test.
